sizing_rule.note: Daily HPR calculation using optimal f derived from equalized data. Position size adjusted via formula: Daily HPR = D$/f$ + 1, where D$ is daily P&L in dollars and f$ is dollar amount corresponding to optimal f. This is Vince's approach to position sizing via HPR scaling with optimal f denominator.

source_rule_text: Calculate daily HPR using equalized data by dividing the dollar gain or loss on one unit by the optimal f value, then adding 1 to determine position sizing adjustments.
